raw_title: U.S. military is using AI to help plan Iran air attacks, sources say, as lawmakers call for oversight
raw_content:
“It’s very dangerous that ‘speed’ is somehow being sold to us as strategic here, when it’s really a cover for indiscriminate targeting when you consider how inaccurate these models are,” Khlaaf said.

The post U.S. military is using AI to help plan Iran air attacks, sources say, as lawmakers call for oversight appeared first on AI Now Institute.
